response.original_title: Like A Moth To A Flame (Visual Film)
response.overview: A tragic dance of control, freedom, and divine intervention.  "Like A Moth To A Flame" is a dialogue-free, music-driven Renaissance short film.  One lover controls every step, every turn, and every breath, while the other suffocates under his grip, desperate to escape.  Watch the background closely as the women dancing are not ordinary people, they are actually her guardian angels hidden in plain sight. They mirror her, reminding her of who she is, fueling her desire to flee, and gently guiding her toward the light of her own independence.
response.title: Like A Moth To A Flame (Visual Film)

results.name: Like A Moth To A Flame- A Renaissance Visual Short Film
